rule.zh: 产品型谱、价格和销量目标均按历史资料呈现，不更新为当前事实。
rule.en: Portfolio, price and volume targets are presented as historical source content, not current facts.

metric_title.zh: 短尾与常规尾型谱覆盖

conclusion.zh: PPT显示XCMG在该吨级仅有一款短尾产品，而久保田用短尾、常规尾和低配常规尾覆盖不同场景。
conclusion.en: The PPT shows one XCMG short-tail model in the class, while Kubota spans short-tail, conventional-tail and lower-spec conventional-tail variants.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

gap.zh: 缺少开阔场地重载作业所需的常规尾产品
gap.en: No conventional-tail model for heavy work in open sites

conclusion.zh: 第50–58页称XE35U PRO计划于2025年7月导入，第67页又称已实施减重设计；两种历史表述不能自动等同于当前量产状态。
conclusion.en: Slides 50-58 describe a July 2025 introduction plan, while slide 67 says weight-reduction designs had been implemented. These historical statements do not establish the current production status.

decision.zh: 在产品、制造和销售确认前标记为待验证。
decision.en: Keep as pending validation until confirmed by product, manufacturing and sales owners.

conclusion.zh: PPT将XE35U定位为“中质低价”，同时承认品牌、渠道和工况适配弱于标杆。
conclusion.en: The PPT positions the XE35U as a mid-quality, value-priced offering while acknowledging disadvantages in brand strength, channel capability and application fit.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 194台是PPT记录的2025年销售目标，不是实际销量或当前目标。
conclusion.en: The 194-unit figure is a 2025 sales target recorded in the PPT, not an actual result or current target.
